title: Emu/Tern Charge Case battery status
scenario: Charge Case battery status greys out and shows last known level when earbuds are removed or case is closed on Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
2. Ensure the Charge Case is closed or that both earbuds are inside the case.
3. On the Home screen, observe the battery status display area below the earbuds' battery levels.
4. Open the Charge Case with both earbuds inside.
5. Observe the Charge Case battery icon and percentage in the status box.
6. Remove one or both earbuds from the Charge Case.
7. Observe the Charge Case battery icon in the status box.
8. Place the earbuds back into the Charge Case and close the lid.
9. Observe the Charge Case battery icon in the status box.
expected: When the Charge Case is opened with both earbuds inside, the CC battery level is shown in green with the correct percentage, below the earbuds' battery levels and centered in the status box. When one or both earbuds are removed from the case, or when the case is closed (with or without earbuds inside), the battery icon is greyed out and shows the last known battery level.
